110.title: Insurance
110.description: Federal diversity jurisdiction over insurance contract disputes between citizens of different states.

190.title: Other Contract
190.description: Federal diversity jurisdiction over contract disputes between citizens of different states.

240.title: Torts to Land
240.description: Federal diversity jurisdiction over tort claims involving land disputes between citizens of different states.

290.title: Real Property
290.description: Federal diversity jurisdiction over real property disputes between citizens of different states.

310.title: Airplane Personal Injury
310.description: Federal jurisdiction over personal injury claims arising from airplane accidents and aviation-related incidents.

320.title: Assault, Libel & Slander
320.description: Federal diversity jurisdiction over assault, libel, and slander claims between citizens of different states.

340.title: Marine/Maritime
340.description: Federal maritime jurisdiction over marine and shipping-related disputes, including admiralty and maritime claims.

350.title: Motor Vehicle
350.description: Federal diversity jurisdiction over motor vehicle accident claims between citizens of different states.

360.title: Other Personal Injury
360.description: Federal diversity jurisdiction over miscellaneous personal injury claims between citizens of different states.

362.title: Medical Malpractice
362.description: Federal diversity jurisdiction over medical malpractice claims between citizens of different states.

365.title: Personal Injury - Product Liability
365.description: Federal diversity jurisdiction over product liability personal injury claims between citizens of different states.

368.title: Asbestos Personal Injury
368.description: Federal diversity jurisdiction over personal injury claims arising from asbestos exposure and contamination.

371.title: Truth in Lending
371.description: Federal statute requiring creditors to disclose credit terms clearly and protect consumers from abusive lending practices.

380.title: Other Personal Property Damage
380.description: Federal diversity jurisdiction over personal property damage claims between citizens of different states.

385.title: Property Damage - Product Liability
385.description: Federal diversity jurisdiction over product liability property damage claims between citizens of different states.

400.title: State Reapportionment
400.description: Federal jurisdiction over constitutional challenges to state legislative reapportionment.

410.title: Antitrust
410.description: Sherman Act prohibits agreements that unreasonably restrain trade and monopolistic conduct in interstate commerce.

422.title: Bankruptcy Appeals
422.description: Federal jurisdiction over appeals from bankruptcy court decisions.

423.title: Withdrawal of Reference
423.description: Federal jurisdiction over withdrawal of bankruptcy proceedings from bankruptcy court to district court.

430.title: Banks and Banking
430.description: Federal regulation of national bank operations, powers, and activities.

440.title: Other Civil Rights
440.description: Federal statute providing civil remedies for deprivation of rights under color of state law.

441.title: Voting
441.description: Federal statute protecting voting rights and prohibiting discrimination in voting on basis of race or color.

442.title: Employment/Title VII
442.description: Title VII prohibits employment discrimination based on race, color, religion, sex, or national origin.

443.title: Housing/Accommodations
443.description: Fair Housing Act prohibits discrimination in housing based on race, color, religion, sex, or national origin.

444.title: Welfare
444.description: Federal welfare programs providing temporary assistance to needy families.

445.title: ADA - Employment
445.description: Americans with Disabilities Act prohibits employment discrimination against individuals with disabilities.

446.title: ADA - Other
446.description: Americans with Disabilities Act provides comprehensive protections against disability discrimination in public accommodations and services.

448.title: Education
448.description: Title IX prohibits sex discrimination in educational programs and activities receiving federal financial assistance.

450.title: Commerce/Interstate
450.description: Federal jurisdiction over actions arising under federal interstate commerce statutes.

460.title: Deportation
460.description: Federal statute establishing grounds for deportation of aliens from the United States.

462.title: Naturalization
462.description: Federal statute establishing requirements and procedures for naturalization and citizenship.

463.title: Habeas Corpus - Alien Detainee
463.description: Federal statute allowing habeas corpus petitions by alien detainees challenging unlawful detention.

470.title: RICO
470.description: Racketeer Influenced and Corrupt Organizations Act prohibits criminal enterprises and patterns of racketeering activity.

480.title: Consumer Credit
480.description: Federal consumer credit protection laws regulate credit transactions and lending practices.

490.title: Cable/Satellite TV
490.description: Federal regulation of cable television and satellite television services and rates.

510.title: Prisoner Petition - Motions to Vacate
510.description: Federal statute allowing prisoners to challenge unlawful sentences through motions to vacate sentence.

530.title: Habeas Corpus - General
530.description: Federal statute providing habeas corpus remedies for unlawful detention.

535.title: Habeas Corpus - Death Penalty
535.description: Federal statute allowing state prisoners under death sentence to challenge constitutionality of conviction through habeas corpus.

540.title: Mandamus & Other
540.description: Federal jurisdiction over actions seeking mandamus against federal officers for non-discretionary duties.

550.title: Civil Rights (prisoner)
550.description: Civil rights statute allowing prisoners to sue for deprivation of constitutional rights under color of state law.

555.title: Prison Conditions
555.description: Federal statute allowing prisoners to seek remedies for unconstitutional conditions of confinement.

560.title: Civil Detainee
560.description: Federal statute allowing habeas corpus relief for persons held in civil detention.

610.title: Agriculture
610.description: Federal agricultural regulation statutes governing farming, crop insurance, and agricultural practices.

620.title: Other Food & Drug
620.description: Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act regulates food, drugs, and cosmetics safety and labeling.

625.title: Drug Related Seizure of Property
625.description: Federal statute providing for civil forfeiture of property used in drug trafficking.

630.title: Liquor Laws
630.description: Federal regulation of alcohol production, importation, and distribution.

640.title: RR & Truck
640.description: Federal regulation of railroads and motor carriers transportation.

650.title: Airline Regulations
650.description: Federal regulation of airline operations and commercial aviation.

660.title: Occupational Safety/Health
660.description: Occupational Safety and Health Act requires employers to provide safe working conditions.

690.title: Other Forfeiture/Penalty
690.description: Federal jurisdiction over civil forfeiture and penalty actions.

710.title: Fair Labor Standards Act
710.description: Fair Labor Standards Act establishes minimum wage, overtime, and child labor standards.

720.title: Labor/Management Relations
720.description: National Labor Relations Act regulates labor-management relations and collective bargaining.

730.title: Labor/Management Reporting
730.description: Labor-Management Reporting and Disclosure Act requires disclosure of labor organization financial and operational information.

740.title: Railway Labor Act
740.description: Railway Labor Act regulates labor relations in railroad and airline industries.

751.title: Family Medical Leave Act
751.description: Family and Medical Leave Act requires covered employers to provide unpaid job-protected leave.

790.title: Other Labor Litigation
790.description: Federal jurisdiction over miscellaneous labor law disputes and claims.

791.title: ERISA
791.description: Employee Retirement Income Security Act regulates employee benefit plans and protections.

810.title: Selective Service
810.description: Federal statute regulating military selective service and draft registration.

820.title: Copyright
820.description: Federal copyright law protects original works of authorship and grants exclusive rights to creators.

830.title: Patent
830.description: Patent law grants exclusive rights to inventors for their inventions and technological innovations.

840.title: Trademark
840.description: Trademark law protects registered marks used in commerce from unauthorized use and dilution.

850.title: Securities/Commodities/Exchange
850.description: Securities Act requires disclosure of investment information and regulates securities offerings.

860.title: Social Security
860.description: Social Security Act establishes federal social insurance and assistance programs.

861.title: Social Security - Disability
861.description: Social Security Disability Insurance provides benefits to disabled workers and their dependents.

862.title: Social Security - Black Lung
862.description: Black Lung Benefits Act provides compensation for coal miners with occupational lung diseases.

863.title: Social Security - DIWC
863.description: Disabled Individual Work Continuation program under Social Security.

864.title: Social Security - SSI
864.description: Supplemental Security Income provides needs-based assistance to low-income elderly and disabled persons.

865.title: Social Security - IRA
865.description: Individual Retirement Accounts under Social Security regulations.

870.title: Tax Suits
870.description: Federal tax statute establishing jurisdiction and procedures for tax disputes and refund suits.

871.title: IRS - Third Party
871.description: Federal tax statute governing IRS summons to third parties and protections for taxpayers.

875.title: Customer Challenge
875.description: Federal statute governing customer challenges to banking institution records and secrecy.

890.title: Other Statutory Actions
890.description: Federal jurisdiction over civil actions arising under federal statutes.

891.title: Agricultural Acts
891.description: Federal agricultural statutes governing crop insurance, subsidies, and farming regulations.

893.title: Environmental Matters
893.description: National Environmental Policy Act requires environmental impact assessment for federal actions.

895.title: Freedom of Information Act
895.description: Freedom of Information Act grants public access to federal government records with exemptions.

896.title: Arbitration
896.description: Federal Arbitration Act enforces written agreements to arbitrate disputes in interstate commerce.

899.title: Admin Procedure Act/Review
899.description: Administrative Procedure Act provides judicial review of federal agency actions and decisions.

900.title: Appeal of Fee Determination
900.description: Federal statute governing appeals of fee determination in federal proceedings.

910.title: Domestic Relations
910.description: Federal statute regarding recognition of state domestic relations judgments in federal proceedings.

920.title: Insanity
920.description: Federal statute governing criminal insanity defense and commitment of acquitted defendants.

930.title: Probate
930.description: Federal statute recognizing state probate judgments and determinations in federal proceedings.

940.title: Substitute Trustee
940.description: Federal statute governing substitute trustees in federal proceedings and bankruptcy.

950.title: Constitutionality of State Statutes
950.description: Federal jurisdiction over challenges to constitutionality of state statutes and laws.
